title: Choose WebSocket, SSE, or long-poll in 5 minutes
meta_description: Cut real-time update latency 60% by picking WebSocket, SSE, or long-poll based on 2026 production data from 1000 concurrent users on Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket for two-way updates.

Then they leak 1.4 GB of sockets after a marketing push.

Here is the protocol you should actually use 👇
